title: IsolateSessionStartedPayload
description: Reference-heavy, topology-neutral audit payload for isolate_session_started events.

schema_id.description: Protocol schema identifier for isolate_session_started payload.

schema_version.description: Protocol schema version for isolate_session_started payload.

run_id.description: Run identifier bound to the isolate session.

isolate_id.description: Isolate identifier for the started session.

session_id.description: Session identifier for correlation across isolate lifecycle events.

backend_kind.description: Backend kind in shared operator-facing vocabulary.

isolation_assurance_level.description: Runtime isolation assurance posture for the started isolate session.

provisioning_posture.description: Provisioning/binding posture kept distinct from runtime isolation and audit posture, including not_applicable where backend mechanics differ.

launch_context_digest.description: Digest identity for immutable launch context consumed by the session.

handshake_transcript_hash.description: Canonical handshake transcript hash for replay and binding verification.

launch_receipt_digest.description: Digest reference to launcher runtime launch receipt object.

runtime_image_descriptor_digest.description: Digest reference to RuntimeImageDescriptor used for this session.

applied_hardening_posture_digest.description: Digest reference to applied hardening posture evidence object.

attestation_evidence_digest.description: Optional attestation evidence digest reference for forward-compatible posture upgrades.
